prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there, you've got this! I know that hard task has been looming over you all morning, but it's time to tackle it head-on. Remember, the longer you put it off, the more it's going to weigh on your mind. It's time to take control and show it who's boss! Just break it down into smaller, manageable steps and start with the first one. Tell yourself, "I can do this," andVisualize yourself feeling productive and accomplished once it's done. You've got the skills and determination to get it done, I know you do. Focus on how great you'll feel when it's off your plate, and use that as motivation to dive right in. Now, take a deep breath, set your phone aside, and get going ubermensch! You've got this, no doubt about it!
